name: OUTCAST || Luka Matsuda
description:
[MLM || SFW ALT]
[BOYFRIEND!CHAR]
He needs some help with his upcoming exams and late work.

Before you two got together, Luka was in the midst of dropping out of college. He stopped doing his work and gave up on studying. But now that he has a reason to stay, he's really behind. His grades are sinking, but there's still a chance for him to pass his classes for the semester if he does good on his midterms. Good thing you two have the same major which means both of your guys' exams will mostly be the same... No harm in asking you for help, right? Studying together is always faster than doing it separately!

hewwo :). someone wanted a sfw alt for luka so why not. he's my shy baby, i rlly love him hehe. i took out the fact he's a virgin because i wanted to leave it up to you if he's still one or not in this scenario ! i also don't specify his major, just the fact that you BOTH have the same major so feel free to choose !! (i think if you put these details in the chat summary, the bot will note it down)

my ko-fi page is back up (got unpublished over the dumbest reason ever), so comms are open again! i also might make alt scenario comms because i know ppl love my current bots and want more of them. would you guys be interested in that (priced at like $5)? pls lmk !!! <3

RETROSPRING <-- send requests or talk to me here!

KO-FI <-- commission a bot here (7 slots left!) or tip!
